---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing tool or propose a new tool
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is this for an existing tool or a new tool?

- [ ] Improvement to an **existing tool** — specify which: `___________`
- [ ] A **brand-new tool**

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What are you currently unable to do, or what is painful about the current experience?

> 

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or behaviour you would like to see.

> 

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

> 

## Mockup / Example

If applicable, add a sketch, screenshot, or example output that illustrates what you have in mind.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references that would help evaluate this request.

>
